actionCalls.name: ASRV_ASR_Request_moved_to_Verbally_Confirmed
actionCalls.label: ASRV - ASR Request moved to Verbally Confirmed

actionCalls.name: DDQ_Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_templates
actionCalls.label: DDQ Did we try to send the SW templates?”

actionCalls.name: NDAYN_DDQ_Complexity_Alert_Yes_no_but_there_is_a_contract
actionCalls.label: NDAYN - DDQ Complexity Alert (Yes, no but there is a contract)

actionCalls.name: NSI_A_new_Sales_Intelligence_Deal_Support_request_was_submitted
actionCalls.label: NSI - A new Sales Intelligence Deal Support request was submitted

actionCalls.name: Search_Intelligence_Deal_Support_Alert_to_Recipient
actionCalls.label: Search Intelligence Deal Support Alert to Recipient

actionCalls.name: Send_AS_Request_Has_Been_Cancelled_alert
actionCalls.label: Send AS Request Has Been Cancelled alert

actionCalls.name: Shopper_Intelligence_Deal_Support_Request_Created
actionCalls.label: Shopper Intelligence Deal Support Request Created

decisions.description: MIS-3793 - send an alert if Did we try to send the SW templates? is marked as no
decisions.name: Alert_on_DDQ_if_FISD_was_not_sent
decisions.label: Alert on DDQ if FISD was not sent

rules.name: Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_templates_no
rules.label: Did we try to send the SW templates - no

decisions.description:
All decisions after this decision should stop once it's executed Like 'Stop' in Process Builder
All decisions before this decision should be connected to each other (Default outcome) Like 'Evaluate Next' in Process Builder.
decisions.name: NEXT_RULE_HERE_PLEASE
decisions.label: NEXT RULE HERE PLEASE!!!!

decisions.description: ASR Request moved to Closed Won, Completed, Initiated
decisions.name: Rule_ARSW_ASR_Request_moved_to_Closed_Won_Completed_Initiated
decisions.label: *Rule (ARSW)* - ASR Request moved to Closed Won, Completed, Initiated

decisions.name: Rule_ASRV_ASR_Request_moved_to_Verbally_Confirmed
decisions.label: *Rule (ASRV)* - ASR Request moved to Verbally Confirmed

rules.name: ASR_Request_moved_to_Verbally_Confirmed
rules.label: ASR Request moved to Verbally Confirmed

decisions.name: Rule_ASW_AS_Request_Closed_Won_Opp_Upd
decisions.label: *Rule (ASW)* - AS Request Closed Won Opp Upd

decisions.description: This node has been created in the After Save flow because Before Save will fail due to the update field Error: fr_SLG_Bucket_DDQ (Formula) - When the TriggerType field is set to "RecordBeforeSave", the $Record.Account__r.ARR_Bucket__c field isn't supported.
decisions.name: Rule_CSASLG_Update_SLG_Bucket
decisions.label: *Rule (CSASLG)* - Update SLG Bucket

rightValue.stringValue: No, but there is a customer contract in place with a confidentiality provision

decisions.description: If recipient has been changed for SE record type - execute 'Recipient is changed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_RCSE_Recipient_is_changed_for_SE
decisions.label: *Rule (RCSE)* Recipient is changed for SE

rules.name: Recipient_was_changed
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9)
rules.label: Recipient was changed

rules.name: RT_CSA_and_is_new_or_recipient_is_changed
rules.label: RT = CSA and is new or recipient is changed

decisions.description: Check Type of Ext and if it's ISNEW()
decisions.name: Rule_TE_Type_Of_Extention
decisions.label: *Rule (TE)* -Type Of Extention

decisions.name: Rule_TNY_SW_Template_Not_yet_Yes_No_but_there_is
decisions.label: *Rule (TNY) * - SW Template = Not yet (Yes, No, but there is..)

rules.name: SW_Template_Not_yet_Yes_No_but_there_is

rightValue.stringValue: No, but there is a customer contract in place with a confidentiality provision

rules.label: SW Template = Not yet (Yes, No, but there is..)

decisions.name: Rule_TY_SW_Template_Yes_the_client_had_accepted_it
decisions.label: *Rule (TY)* - SW Template = Yes, the client had accepted it

rules.name: SW_Template_Yes_the_client_had_accepted_it

rightValue.stringValue: Yes, the client had accepted it

rules.label: SW Template = Yes, the client had accepted it

decisions.name: Rule_TYPC_SW_Template_Yes_pending_client_review
decisions.label: *Rule (TYPC)* - SW Template = Yes, pending client review

rules.name: SW_Template_Yes_pending_client_review
rules.label: SW Template = Yes, pending client review

Flow.description: Deactivated ASR Request Submitted(Agencies Strategic) alert MIS-7445 - Added Churn Protection's Resolution Date update MIS-7894 - Shopper Deal Support Request MIS-6937 - Request Approved By Billing Notification MIS-7797 - AS Request auto-cancellation MIS-7445 - Added Churn Protection Status Update MIS-7726 - Add Insights Request Record Type MIS-7521 - Added Missing SDK/APP Record Type MIS-7372 - Modified ASR Emails MIS-6981 - Removed Zendesk Tickets MIS-6886 MIS-6824 MIS-5942 - Added Data Escalation to Rule RWC MIS-5630 MIS-5489 MQ-2162 mis-5291 recipient manager email MIS-5025 remove NDA=no pending customer MIS-4963 - Legal/DDQ Threshold MIS-4855 MIS-4753 MIS-4730 MIS-4464 MIS-3523 v1 MIS-3222 - MIS-3015 MIS-2862 MIS-2869 MQ-1434

formulas.name: fr_SLG_Bucket_DDQ
formulas.expression: Case({!$Record.Account__r.ARR_Bucket__c} , 'Bucket 1','Insight Email', 'Bucket 2', 'Insight Email;Training Session', 'Bucket 3', 'Insight Email;Training Session;Short Deck', 'Bucket 4', 'Insight Email;Training Session;Short Deck;Large Deck', null)

Flow.label: Request - Record-Triggered - After Save

recordLookups.name: get_GetAtLeast1DDQRequest
recordLookups.label: Get at least 1 DDQ Request
recordLookups.filterLogic: (1 OR 6) AND 5 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4) AND 7

recordUpdates.name: ASCU_Updated_Status_and_List_Price_on_Opportunity
recordUpdates.label: ASCU - Updated Status and List Price on Opportunity

recordUpdates.name: ASW_Opp_AS_Status_and_AS_List_Price_Upd
recordUpdates.label: ASW - Opp AS Status and AS List Price Upd

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Update_status_to_Pending_Requestor
recordUpdates.label: Copy 1 of Update status to Pending Requestor
